task.name: Merge Documents
task.objective: Merge multiple markdown files back into a single document (inverse of shard-doc)

step.title: Identify Source Files
step.action: Ask user for directory containing sharded files or list of files to merge
Read all source files and determine correct ordering

step.title: Validate Structure
step.action: Check heading levels are consistent across files

step.title: Merge
step.action: Add document header and table of contents if needed
Fix cross-references to use section anchors instead of file links

step.title: Output
step.action: Write merged document to user-specified location
